params.name: Fleming's Diode
params.description:
On May 23, 1884 AD, Fleming met with Edison during his visit to America, and he designed this electron diode because of their meeting.
This diode is the masterpiece of British engineer, Fleming. It has the characteristic of unidirectional conduction as semi-conductors and the functions of detection and rectification. As one of the core components of future electron equipment, it is the initial model of the electron tube, which was a huge milestone, opening up the development of the entire ele …
